name: 理论与概念化表达
description: 用于把文献、理论视角、概念界定和经验假设组织成可检验的解释框架。

clusters.meaning: 引入理论视角和分析镜头

expressions.en: a fresh lens through which to understand
expressions.note: 比 new perspective 更具体，强调这个视角帮助重新理解现象。
expressions.example: The framework offers a fresh lens through which to understand fertility.

expressions.note: 比 use a perspective 更自然，适合把研究从个体转向互动过程。
expressions.example: We adopt a relational perspective on housework.

expressions.note: 适合从文献综述过渡到本文假设，避免 abrupt transition。
expressions.example: In this theoretical framework, intentions reflect future expectations.

expressions.note: 适合说明理论视角转换，语气比 reject 更稳妥。
expressions.example: This study departs from an individual-level perspective.

expressions.note: 用于概括理论核心，不只是引用作者。
expressions.example: The linked-lives perspective emphasizes family interdependence.

clusters.meaning: 概念化和解释性理论账户

expressions.note: 比 combine literatures 更有研究设计感，适合说明贡献来自把两个原本分开的议题放在同一框架。
expressions.example: We integrate parallel lines of investigation on work and family.

expressions.en: Conceptually, X is well grounded in Y.
expressions.note: 适合在理论段说明某视角不是临时拼接，而是有既有理论支撑。
expressions.example: Conceptually, this approach is well grounded in gender theories.

expressions.note: 比 define 更有理论建构感，适合引入核心概念。
expressions.example: We conceptualize flexibility as a work-family resource.

expressions.note: account 强调解释框架，不只是列举原因。
expressions.example: We provide theoretical accounts of how flexibility shapes labor division.

expressions.en: This section integrates A and B to provide...
expressions.note: 适合理论综述小节开头，结构清晰。
expressions.example: This section integrates policy narratives and planned behavior theory.

clusters.meaning: 从文献整合推进到经验预测

expressions.note: 适合说明本文关注一个以往被忽视的人群或维度。
expressions.example: We extend the attention to unmarried adults.

expressions.note: 比 hypotheses 更强调从理论推导出的可观察模式。
expressions.example: The theory yields several empirical predictions.

expressions.en: turn theoretical discussion into empirical predictions
expressions.note: 这是从 literature review 到 hypotheses 的关键修辞动作。
expressions.example: We turn the theoretical discussion into empirical predictions.

expressions.en: build a bridge between two research conversations
expressions.note: 强调跨文献整合，但比 bridge literatures 更具体。
expressions.example: The paper builds a bridge between policy and fertility research.

expressions.en: reframe a policy tool as a theoretical mechanism
expressions.note: 适合把政策变量从背景因素提升为解释机制。
expressions.example: We reframe flexibility as a theoretical mechanism.

clusters.meaning: 理论视角、概念化和竞争解释之间的组织

expressions.note: 比 common 更有规范化意味，适合写家庭和生命历程转变。
expressions.example: Cohabitation has become a normative experience.

expressions.note: 适合把教育、收入、资产转化为关系权力机制。
expressions.example: The resource-bargaining perspective fits the findings.

expressions.note: 同时标记时间过程和关系单位，是理论贡献表达。
expressions.example: The study takes a dynamic and dyadic perspective.

expressions.note: 可作为被检验、被限定或被挑战的理论对象。
expressions.example: The findings qualify the family instability hypothesis.

expressions.en: X may be more appropriate than Y in explaining Z.
expressions.note: 适合讨论段比较理论解释力，语气比 proves 更稳。
expressions.example: Specialization may be more appropriate than doing gender.

expressions.note: 适合理论定义，不只是 say X is important。
expressions.example: Intergenerational relationships constitute a central social relationship.
